metadata.note: Archetype A dyad AND-gate: centroid_ids={ASIA-PAKISTAN} + primary_target=ASIA-AFGHANISTAN (sparser centroid in target: AFG 1420 < PAK 6345). The target gate is what makes the generic domain verbs safe here (strike/airstrike/border/militant/clash) -- a title only attributes if it carries BOTH centroids. Pre-audited 2026-07-17: border n=94, militant n=30, Taliban n=150, Kabul n=117, all on-topic under the gate. Dropped as dead: Chaman, Waziristan, Spin Boldak, Muttaqi, Mujahid, deportation, incursion. Non-EN lists are thin by corpus (this dyad reports overwhelmingly in EN) but kept for script coverage; only long/specific forms per rule 6b.
